scripts.db:init: bash -c 'set -a && source .env && set +a && if [ -n "$DB_PASSWORD" ]; then mysql -h "$DB_HOST" -P "$DB_PORT" -u "$DB_USER" -p"$DB_PASSWORD" < database/schema.sql; else mysql -h "$DB_HOST" -P "$DB_PORT" -u "$DB_USER" < database/schema.sql; fi'
scripts.db:reset: bash -c 'set -a && source .env && set +a && if [ -n "$DB_PASSWORD" ]; then mysql -h "$DB_HOST" -P "$DB_PORT" -u "$DB_USER" -p"$DB_PASSWORD" -e "DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS $DB_NAME;" && mysql -h "$DB_HOST" -P "$DB_PORT" -u "$DB_USER" -p"$DB_PASSWORD" < database/schema.sql; else mysql -h "$DB_HOST" -P "$DB_PORT" -u "$DB_USER" -e "DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS $DB_NAME;" && mysql -h "$DB_HOST" -P "$DB_PORT" -u "$DB_USER" < database/schema.sql; fi'
